SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 3 TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING CLAIM STIPEND WAS FOR WORK PERFORMED. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 5. 1) 4TH. CAUSE OF ACTION RE GOV. CODE 11135 BARRED BY 2YR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS AND NO TOLLING. 2) 5TH. CAUSE OF ACTION RE UNRUH ACT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BECAUSE FAILED TO FILE GOVERNMENT CLAIM AND NO TOLLING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar. Matter heard on August 8, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rose-Ellen Heinz Fairgrieve, DCA, from the Office of the City Attorney, 415-554-3845, for defendant and moving party
Claudia Center, Esq., and Rachael Langston, Esq., from Legal Aid Society, for Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST. AMENDED COMPLAINT.
SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 3 TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING CLAIM STIPEND WAS FOR WORK PERFORMED.
SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 5
1) 4TH. CAUSE OF ACTION RE GOV. CODE 11135 BARRED BY 2YR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS AND NO TOLLING.
2) 5TH. CAUSE OF ACTION RE UNRUH ACT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BECAUSE FAILED TO FILE GOVERNMENT CLAIM AND NO TOLLING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/REQ) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
